requirements.summary: Remove the second footer paragraph that renders the “Built with … using caffeine.ai” attribution from FooterSection.
acceptanceCriteria:
The footer no longer renders the second

element that contains the 'Built with … using caffeine.ai' attribution.
The footer still renders the social icon buttons and the copyright line unchanged.
No empty spacing or layout artifacts remain after removing the paragraph (overall footer spacing remains visually balanced).

file_operations.description:
Delete only the JSX for the second

in the footer (the Caffeine.ai attribution line) corresponding to XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/footer[1]/div[1]/div[1]/p[2], without changing social links/buttons or the copyright paragraph. Ensure no leftover empty wrapper/spacing artifacts remain.
